name: Great Aunt Jane's Tuna Macaroni Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the macaroni and drain.
2. Drain the tuna and flake it.
3. In a bowl, mix together the cream of mushroom soup, softened cream cheese, milk, dried onion flakes, and mustard.
4. Add the drained macaroni and flaked tuna to the bowl with the soup mixture. Stir until everything is well combined.
5. Transfer the mixture to a buttered casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle buttered cracker crumbs on top.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
This casserole is creamy and rich. I usually add another can of tuna and some frozen peas!
